content.text: I'll read all three files first to confirm their current state before making any edits.

content.content:
1→/** 2→ * AI 日报上下文预处理工具 3→ * - HTML 清洗：去除 HTML 标签，保留纯文本 4→ * - 上下文压缩：按人分组 → 三分字段 → 相同内容连续日期合并 5→ */ 6→ 7→interface ReportFields { 8→ today: string 9→ tomorrow: string 10→ upcoming: string 11→} 12→ 13→interface PersonDateEntry { 14→ date: string 15→ fields: ReportFields | null 16→ /** 未提交 / 休息日等特殊文本 */ 17→ special: string | null 18→} 19→ 20→// ---------------------------------------------------------------- 21→// HTML 清洗 22→// ---------------------------------------------------------------- 23→ 24→/** 25→ * 去除 HTML 标签，保留纯文本 26→ */ 27→export function stripHtml(html: string): string { 28→ if (!html) return '' 29→ //
转换行 30→ let text = html.replace(//gi, '\n') 31→ const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(text, 'text/html') 32→ text = doc.body.textContent ?? '' 33→ //   在 textContent 中会变成 \u00A0 34→ text = text.replace(/\u00A0/g, ' ') 35→ // 连续 3+ 换行压缩为 2 个 36→ text = text.replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n') 37→ return text.trim() 38→} 39→ 40→// ---------------------------------------------------------------- 41→// 从日报 HTML 表格提取三个字段 42→// ---------------------------------------------------------------- 43→ 44→// 标题关键词 → 字段名映射 45→const LABEL_KEYWORDS: { key: keyof ReportFields; keywords: string[] }[] = [ 46→ { key: 'today', keywords: ['今日工作', "today's work", 'today work'] }, 47→ { key: 'tomorrow', keywords: ['明日工作', "tomorrow's work", 'tomorrow work'] }, 48→ { key: 'upcoming', keywords: ['近期工作', 'upcoming work', 'upcoming schedule'] }, 49→] 50→ 51→/** 52→ * 根据第一列标题文本匹配字段名 53→ */ 54→function matchFieldKey(labelText: string): keyof ReportFields | null { 55→ const lower = labelText.toLowerCase().trim() 56→ for (const { key, keywords } of LABEL_KEYWORDS) { 57→ if (keywords.some(kw => lower.includes(kw))) return key 58→ } 59→ return null 60→} 61→ 62→/** 63→ * 解析日报 HTML 表格，提取三字段纯文本 64→ * 按第一列标题文本匹配字段，兼容行顺序变化、多余行、缺少行 65→ */ 66→export function parseReportContent(htmlContent: string): ReportFields | null { 67→ if (!htmlContent) return null 68→ try { 69→ const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(htmlContent, 'text/html') 70→ const rows = doc.querySelectorAll('tr') 71→ if (rows.length === 0) return null 72→ 73→ const result: ReportFields = { today: '', tomorrow: '', upcoming: '' } 74→ let matched = 0 75→ 76→ for (let i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) { 77→ const cells = rows[i].querySelectorAll('td') 78→ if (cells.length < 2) continue 79→ 80→ const label = cells[0].textContent ?? '' 81→ const fieldKey = matchFieldKey(label) 82→ if (fieldKey) { 83→ result[fieldKey] = stripHtml(cells[1].innerHTML) 84→ matched++ 85→ } 86→ } 87→ 88→ // 至少匹配到 1 个字段才视为有效表格 89→ return matched > 0 ? result : null 90→ } catch { 91→ return null 92→ } 93→} 94→ 95→// ---------------------------------------------------------------- 96→// 上下文压缩 97→// ---------------------------------------------------------------- 98→ 99→/** 日期字符串 YYYY-MM-DD 格式化为 M/D */ 100→function formatShortDate(dateStr: string): string { 101→ const parts = dateStr.split('-') 102→ if (parts.length < 3) return dateStr 103→ const m = parseInt(parts[1], 10) 104→ const d = parseInt(parts[2], 10) 105→ return `${m}/${d}` 106→} 107→ 108→/** 判断两个 YYYY-MM-DD 日期是否连续（差 1 天） */ 109→function isConsecutive(dateA: string, dateB: string): boolean { 110→ const a = new Date(dateA) 111→ const b = new Date(dateB) 112→ const diff = Math.abs(a.getTime() - b.getTime()) 113→ return diff <= 86400000 // 1天 114→} 115→ 116→interface DateRange { 117→ dates: string[] // 升序排列的 YYYY-MM-DD 118→ content: string 119→} 120→ 121→/** 122→ * 将同一字段的 {date, content}[] 按连续日期 + 相同内容合并为区间 123→ */ 124→function mergeDateRanges(entries: { date: string; content: string }[]): DateRange[] { 125→ if (!entries.length) return [] 126→ 127→ // 按日期升序 128→ const sorted = [...entries].sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date)) 129→ const ranges: DateRange[] = [] 130→ let current: DateRange = { dates: [sorted[0].date], content: sorted[0].content } 131→ 132→ for (let i = 1; i < sorted.length; i++) { 133→ const prev = current.dates[current.dates.length - 1] 134→ if (sorted[i].content === current.content && isConsecutive(prev, sorted[i].date)) { 135→ current.dates.push(sorted[i].date) 136→ } else { 137→ ranges.push(current) 138→ current = { dates: [sorted[i].date], content: sorted[i].content } 139→ } 140→ } 141→ ranges.push(current) 142→ return ranges 143→} 144→ 145→/** 格式化日期区间标签 */ 146→function formatRangeLabel(dates: string[]): string { 147→ if (dates.length === 1) return `[${formatShortDate(dates[0])}]` 148→ return `[${formatShortDate(dates[0])}-${formatShortDate(dates[dates.length - 1])}]` 149→} 150→ 151→const FIELD_LABELS: Record = { 152→ today: '今日工作内容', 153→ tomorrow: '明日工作计划', 154→ upcoming: '近期工作安排', 155→} 156→ 157→/** 158→ * 对 AiSyncModal 生成的日报 context 做预处理： 159→ * 1. HTML 清洗 160→ * 2. 按人分组 + 三分字段 161→ * 3. 同一人同字段连续日期内容相同时合并 162→ */ 163→export function compressDailyContext(context: string): string { 164→ if (!context) return '' 165→ 166→ // 按 --- 分割为日期段 167→ const sections = context.split(/\n-{3,}\n/) 168→ const personMap = new Map() 169→ 170→ for (const section of sections) { 171→ // 提取日期 172→ const dateMatch = section.match(/【(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})】/) 173→ if (!dateMatch) continue 174→ const date = dateMatch[1] 175→ 176→ // 按人分割：找到 "花名：" 开头的段落 177→ // AiSyncModal 拼接格式：已提交 "花名：\n"，未提交/休息日 "花名：文本" 178→ // 各人之间用 \n\n 分隔 179→ const afterDate = section.slice(section.indexOf('】') + 1).trim() 180→ const personBlocks = afterDate.split(/\n\n(?=\S+?：)/) 181→ 182→ for (const block of personBlocks) { 183→ if (!block.trim()) continue 184→ const nameMatch = block.match(/^(.+?)：\n?([\s\S]*)$/) 185→ if (!nameMatch) continue 186→ const name = nameMatch[1].trim() 187→ const content = nameMatch[2].trim() 188→ 189→ if (!personMap.has(name)) personMap.set(name, []) 190→ 191→ // 判断是否为特殊条目（未提交/休息日） 192→ const isSpecial = !content.includes(' e.fields !== null) as { date: string; fields: ReportFields; special: null }[] 220→ const specialEntries = entries.filter(e => e.special !== null) as { date: string; fields: null; special: string }[] 221→ 222→ if (fieldEntries.length > 0) { 223→ // 对三个字段分别做合并 224→ for (const key of ['today', 'tomorrow', 'upcoming'] as (keyof ReportFields)[]) { 225→ const fieldData = fieldEntries 226→ .map(e => ({ date: e.date, content: e.fields[key] })) 227→ .filter(e => e.content) // 跳过空内容 228→ 229→ if (!fieldData.length) continue 230→ 231→ const ranges = mergeDateRanges(fieldData) 232→ lines.push(`【${FIELD_LABELS[key]}】`) 233→ for (const range of ranges) { 234→ lines.push(`${formatRangeLabel(range.dates)} ${range.content}`) 235→ } 236→ lines.push('') // 字段间空行 237→ } 238→ } 239→ 240→ // 特殊条目（未提交/休息日） 241→ if (specialEntries.length > 0) { 242→ const specialRanges = mergeDateRanges( 243→ specialEntries.map(e => ({ date: e.date, content: e.special })) 244→ ) 245→ for (const range of specialRanges) { 246→ lines.push(`${formatRangeLabel(range.dates)} ${range.content}`) 247→ } 248→ lines.push('') 249→ } 250→ 251→ result.push(lines.join('\n').trim()) 252→ } 253→ 254→ return result.join('\n\n---\n\n') 255→} 256→

1→<template>
     2→    <!-- 无 UI 的 headless 组件 -->
     3→    <span style="display: none" />
     4→</template>
     5→
     6→<script lang="ts">
     7→import { Component, Prop, Vue } from 'vue-property-decorator'
     8→
     9→import dailyReportApis from '@/apis/StaffPage/dailyReportApis'
    10→import dailyReportWeeklySummaryApis from '@/apis/StaffPage/dailyReportWeeklySummaryApis'
    11→import { parseReportContent, stripHtml } from './aiContextUtils'
    12→import { computeSummaryStats, getCurrentWeekBounds, getDayOfWeek, getLastWeekBounds } from './weeklySummaryUtils'
    13→
    14→// 防止并发重复生成
    15→const generatingSet = new Set<string>()
    16→
    17→@Component
    18→export default class WeeklySummaryGenerator extends Vue {
    19→    @Prop({ type: Number, required: true }) sfuserId!: number
    20→    @Prop({ type: String, default: '' }) sfuserNickname!: string
    21→
    22→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
    23→    // 公开方法：检查上周周摘要
    24→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
    25→
    26→    async checkLastWeek(): Promise<void> {
    27→        const today = this.getToday()
    28→        const lastWeek = getLastWeekBounds(today)
    29→        await this.checkAndGenerate(lastWeek.week_start, lastWeek.week_end)
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
    33→    // 公开方法：提交日报后检查本周（周五/六/日触发）
    34→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
    35→
    36→    async checkCurrentWeekAfterSubmit(reportDate: string): Promise<void> {
    37→        const dayOfWeek = getDayOfWeek(reportDate)
    38→        // 仅周五(5)、周六(6)、周日(0) 触发
    39→        if (dayOfWeek !== 5 && dayOfWeek !== 6 && dayOfWeek !== 0) {
    40→            return
    41→        }
    42→
    43→        const currentWeek = getCurrentWeekBounds(reportDate)
    44→        const isSatOrSun = dayOfWeek === 6 || dayOfWeek === 0
    45→
    46→        if (isSatOrSun) {
    47→            // 周六日：无论是否存在都生成（upsert 更新）
    48→            await this.generateForWeek(currentWeek.week_start, currentWeek.week_end)
    49→        } else {
    50→            // 周五：没有才生成
    51→            await this.checkAndGenerate(currentWeek.week_start, currentWeek.week_end)
    52→        }
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
    56→    // 核心：检查 + 生成
    57→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
    58→
    59→    private async checkAndGenerate(weekStart: string, weekEnd: string): Promise<void> {
    60→        try {
    61→            const { has_summary } = await dailyReportWeeklySummaryApis.checkWeeklySummary(weekStart)
    62→            if (has_summary) {
    63→                return
    64→            }
    65→            await this.generateForWeek(weekStart, weekEnd)
    66→        } catch (e) {
    67→            console.warn('[WeeklySummary] checkAndGenerate failed', e)
    68→        }
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
    72→    // 核心：生成周摘要全流程
    73→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
    74→
    75→    async generateForWeek(weekStart: string, weekEnd: string): Promise<void> {
    76→        const lockKey = `${this.sfuserId}:${weekStart}`
    77→        if (generatingSet.has(lockKey)) {
    78→            return
    79→        }
    80→        generatingSet.add(lockKey)
    81→
    82→        try {
    83→            // 1. 拉取自己本周/上周的日报（已解密）
    84→            const reports = await this.fetchMyReports(weekStart, weekEnd)
    85→            if (!reports.length) {
    86→                console.warn('[WeeklySummary] 无日报数据', { weekStart, weekEnd })
    87→                return
    88→            }
    89→
    90→            // 2. 构建日报文本上下文
    91→            const context = this.buildReportContext(reports)
    92→            if (!context) {
    93→                return
    94→            }
    95→
    96→            // 3. 压缩上下文
    97→            const compressed = await this.compressContext(context)
    98→
    99→            // 4. 调 AI 生成周摘要（SSE 流式）
   100→            const stats = computeSummaryStats(
   101→                reports.map(r => ({ content: r.content, report_date: r.report_date })),
   102→            )
   103→            const summaryText = await this.generateSummary(compressed, weekStart, weekEnd, stats)
   104→            if (!summaryText) {
   105→                return
   106→            }
   107→
   108→            // 5. 收集 reporter_ids + cc_ids（用于 authorize_config）
   109→            const { reporterIds, ccIds, reportIds } = this.collectReportMeta(reports)
   110→
   111→            // 6. 加密保存（经 core 加密）
   112→            const saveResult = await dailyReportWeeklySummaryApis.saveWeeklySummary({
   113→                week_start: weekStart,
   114→                week_end: weekEnd,
   115→                content: summaryText,
   116→                submit_days: stats.submit_days,
   117→                total_chars: stats.total_chars,
   118→                report_ids: reportIds,
   119→                encrypt_config: {
   120→                    res_type: 'sfuser',
   121→                    obj: '$this',
   122→                    non_encrypt_columns: [
   123→                        'week_start',
   124→                        'week_end',
   125→                        'submit_days',
   126→                        'total_chars',
   127→                        'report_ids',
   128→                        'sys_lang',
   129→                        'version_info',
   130→                    ],
   131→                },
   132→                authorize_config: {
   133→                    res_type: 'sfuser',
   134→                    sfusers: [...new Set([...reporterIds, ...ccIds])],
   135→                    users: [],
   136→                    emails: [],
   137→                    items: [this.sfuserId],
   138→                    operations: ['response'],
   139→                    expire_time: 3600 * 24 * 90,
   140→                },
   141→            })
   142→
   143→            if (!saveResult) {
   144→                console.warn('[WeeklySummary] 保存失败')
   145→                return
   146→            }
   147→
   148→            console.log('[WeeklySummary] 保存成功', {
   149→                weekStart,
   150→                summaryId: saveResult.id,
   151→                created: saveResult.created,
   152→            })
   153→
   154→            // 7. NER 项目名提取 + 保存 Room/Tunnel
   155→            try {
   156→                const projectNames = await dailyReportWeeklySummaryApis.extractProjects(summaryText)
   157→                if (projectNames.length > 0) {
   158→                    await dailyReportWeeklySummaryApis.saveProjects(
   159→                        this.sfuserId,
   160→                        weekStart,
   161→                        projectNames,
   162→                    )
   163→                    console.log('[WeeklySummary] 项目索引保存', {
   164→                        weekStart,
   165→                        projects: projectNames,
   166→                    })
   167→                }
   168→            } catch (e) {
   169→                // NER 失败不影响主流程
   170→                console.warn('[WeeklySummary] NER 项目提取失败', e)
   171→            }
   172→        } catch (e) {
   173→            console.warn('[WeeklySummary] generateForWeek failed', e)
   174→        } finally {
   175→            generatingSet.delete(lockKey)
   176→        }
   177→    }
   178→
   179→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   180→    // 私有：拉取自己的日报
   181→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   182→
   183→    private async fetchMyReports(
   184→        weekStart: string,
   185→        weekEnd: string,
   186→    ): Promise<Array<{ id: number; content: string; report_date: string; reporter_ids: string; cc_ids: string }>> {
   187→        const data = await dailyReportApis.getMyDailyReportsAPI({
   188→            start_date: weekStart,
   189→            end_date: weekEnd,
   190→            per_page: 7,
   191→            show_rest: 1,
   192→        })
   193→        if (!data?.reports) {
   194→            return []
   195→        }
   196→
   197→        // 筛选在目标周范围内、已提交、有内容的日报
   198→        return data.reports
   199→            .filter((item: any) => {
   200→                const report = item.report
   201→                if (!report || !report.content || report.status !== 1) {
   202→                    return false
   203→                }
   204→                return report.report_date >= weekStart && report.report_date <= weekEnd
   205→            })
   206→            .map((item: any) => ({
   207→                id: item.report.id,
   208→                content: item.report.content,
   209→                report_date: item.report.report_date,
   210→                reporter_ids: item.report.reporter_ids || '',
   211→                cc_ids: item.report.cc_ids || '',
   212→            }))
   213→    }
   214→
   215→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   216→    // 私有：构建日报文本上下文
   217→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   218→
   219→    private buildReportContext(
   220→        reports: Array<{ content: string; report_date: string }>,
   221→    ): string {
   222→        const lines: string[] = []
   223→
   224→        // 按日期排序
   225→        const sorted = [...reports].sort((a, b) => a.report_date.localeCompare(b.report_date))
   226→
   227→        for (const report of sorted) {
   228→            const fields = parseReportContent(report.content)
   229→            if (!fields) {
   230→                // 无法解析 HTML 表格，用纯文本
   231→                const text = stripHtml(report.content)
   232→                lines.push(`【${report.report_date}】\n${text}`)
   233→            } else {
   234→                const parts: string[] = [`【${report.report_date}】`]
   235→                if (fields.today) {
   236→                    parts.push(`今日工作内容：${fields.today}`)
   237→                }
   238→                if (fields.tomorrow) {
   239→                    parts.push(`明日工作内容：${fields.tomorrow}`)
   240→                }
   241→                if (fields.upcoming) {
   242→                    parts.push(`近期工作安排：${fields.upcoming}`)
   243→                }
   244→                lines.push(parts.join('\n'))
   245→            }
   246→        }
   247→
   248→        return lines.join('\n\n---\n\n')
   249→    }
   250→
   251→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   252→    // 私有：gzip 压缩（同 AiChatPanel.compressContext）
   253→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   254→
   255→    private async compressContext(str: string): Promise<string> {
   256→        if (!str) { return str }
   257→        str = str.replaceAll(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n').trim()
   258→        const stream = new (window as any).CompressionStream('gzip')
   259→        const writer = stream.writable.getWriter()
   260→        writer.write(new TextEncoder().encode(str))
   261→        writer.close()
   262→        const chunks: Uint8Array[] = []
   263→        const reader = stream.readable.getReader()
   264→        while (true) {
   265→            const { done, value } = await reader.read()
   266→            if (done) { break }
   267→            chunks.push(value)
   268→        }
   269→        const merged = new Uint8Array(chunks.reduce((n: number, c: Uint8Array) => n + c.length, 0))
   270→        let offset = 0
   271→        for (const c of chunks) { merged.set(c, offset); offset += c.length }
   272→        let binary = ''
   273→        for (let i = 0; i < merged.length; i++) { binary += String.fromCharCode(merged[i]) }
   274→        return 'gz:' + btoa(binary)
   275→    }
   276→
   277→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   278→    // 私有：调 AI 生成周摘要（SSE 流式）
   279→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   280→
   281→    private async generateSummary(
   282→        compressedContext: string,
   283→        weekStart: string,
   284→        weekEnd: string,
   285→        stats: { total_chars: number; submit_days: number },
   286→    ): Promise<string> {
   287→        // 在 report_context 中插入统计数据占位符，让 AI 直接填入
   288→        const contextWithStats = compressedContext
   289→
   290→        const response = await dailyReportWeeklySummaryApis.generateWeeklySummaryStream({
   291→            report_context: contextWithStats,
   292→            week_start: weekStart,
   293→            week_end: weekEnd,
   294→            target_name: this.sfuserNickname || '未知',
   295→        })
   296→
   297→        if (!response.ok) {
   298→            console.warn('[WeeklySummary] generate stream failed', response.status)
   299→            return ''
   300→        }
   301→
   302→        // 消费 SSE 流
   303→        const reader = response.body!.getReader()
   304→        const decoder = new TextDecoder()
   305→        let summaryText = ''
   306→
   307→        while (true) {
   308→            const { done, value } = await reader.read()
   309→            if (done) { break }
   310→
   311→            const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
   312→            const lines = chunk.split('\n')
   313→
   314→            for (const line of lines) {
   315→                if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) { continue }
   316→                try {
   317→                    const data = JSON.parse(line.slice(6))
   318→                    if (data.type === 'chat' && data.content) {
   319→                        summaryText += data.content
   320→                    }
   321→                } catch {
   322→                    // 忽略非 JSON 行
   323→                }
   324→            }
   325→        }
   326→
   327→        // 替换统计占位符为实际值
   328→        summaryText = summaryText
   329→            .replace(/字数:\{total_chars\}/g, `字数:${stats.total_chars}`)
   330→            .replace(/提交:\{submit_days\}\/5/g, `提交:${stats.submit_days}/5`)
   331→
   332→        return summaryText.trim()
   333→    }
   334→
   335→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   336→    // 私有：收集日报元信息
   337→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   338→
   339→    private collectReportMeta(
   340→        reports: Array<{ id: number; reporter_ids: string; cc_ids: string }>,
   341→    ): { reporterIds: number[]; ccIds: number[]; reportIds: number[] } {
   342→        const reporterIdSet = new Set<number>()
   343→        const ccIdSet = new Set<number>()
   344→        const reportIds: number[] = []
   345→
   346→        for (const report of reports) {
   347→            reportIds.push(report.id)
   348→            for (const id of report.reporter_ids.split(',').filter(Boolean)) {
   349→                reporterIdSet.add(Number(id))
   350→            }
   351→            for (const id of report.cc_ids.split(',').filter(Boolean)) {
   352→                ccIdSet.add(Number(id))
   353→            }
   354→        }
   355→
   356→        return {
   357→            reporterIds: [...reporterIdSet],
   358→            ccIds: [...ccIdSet],
   359→            reportIds,
   360→        }
   361→    }
   362→
   363→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   364→    // 私有：获取今天日期
   365→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------
   366→
   367→    private getToday(): string {
   368→        // 优先用 store 中的服务器时间，兜底用本地时间
   369→        const storeDate = (this.$store?.state as any)?.dateTodayInCN
   370→        if (storeDate) {
   371→            return storeDate
   372→        }
   373→        const d = new Date()
   374→        return `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')}`
   375→    }
   376→}
   377→</script>
   378→

content.content:
238→   238→
   239→   239→import AiPromptPopover from './AiPromptPopover.vue'
   240→   240→import AiRoleModal from './AiRoleModal.vue'
   241→   241→import AiSyncModal from './AiSyncModal.vue'
   242→   242→import { compressDailyContext } from './aiContextUtils'
   243→   243→

   245→   245→
   246→   246→@Component({
   247→   247→    name: 'AiChatPanel',
   248→   248→    components: { AiRoleModal, AiSyncModal, AiPromptPopover },
   249→   249→})
   250→   250→export default class extends Vue {
   251→   251→    // 从 OthersReports 传入的分组信息，用于同步日报（value 为该分组的花名数组）
   252→   252→    @Prop({ default: () => [] }) groupOptions!: { label: string; value: string[] }[]

   254→   254→
   255→   255→    panelVisible = false
   256→   256→
   257→   257→    // 角色
   258→   258→    roles: AiRole[] = []

   260→   260→    roleModalVisible = false
   261→   261→    editingRole: AiRole | null = null
   262→   262→
   263→   263→    // 提示词
   264→   264→    prompts: AiPrompt[] = []
   265→   265→
   266→   266→    // 会话 & 消息
   267→   267→    sessions: AiSession[] = []
   268→   268→    currentSessionId: number | null = null
   269→   269→    messages: { role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'context'; content: string; _id?: number; _truncated?: boolean; _fullLength?: number; _fullContent?: string; _loading?: boolean }[] = []
   270→   270→
   271→   271→    // loading 状态
   272→   272→    rolesLoading = false
   273→   273→    sessionsLoading = false
   274→   274→    messagesLoading = false
   275→   275→
   276→   276→    // 聊天输入
   277→   277→    inputText = ''
   278→   278→    isStreaming = false
   279→   279→    reportContext = ''
   280→   280→    /** 当前会话已发送的原始上下文累计字符数 */
   281→   281→    private accumulatedContextChars = 0
   282→   282→    private streamAbort: AbortController | null = null
   283→   283→
   284→   284→    // 意图识别状态
   285→   285→    private slotsConversationId = ''
   286→   286→    // 上一次成功提取的槽位结果，用于续查模式
   287→   287→    private lastSlotResult: ExtractSlotsResult | null = null
   288→   288→
   289→   289→    // System Prompt 编辑
   290→   290→    editingSystemPrompt = ''
   291→   291→
   292→   292→    renderMd(text: string): string {
   293→   293→        // 去掉 AI 返回的 ```text ... ``` 包裹，直接展示纯文本内容
   294→   294→        let s = text || ''
   295→   295→        s = s.replaceAll(/```text\s*\n?([\S\s]*?)```/g, '$1')
   296→   296→        return md.render(s)
   297→   297→    }
   298→   298→
   299→   299→    // gzip 压缩字符串，返回 "gz:<base64>"
   300→   300→    async compressContext(str: string): Promise<string> {
   301→   301→        if (!str) {return str}
   302→   302→        // 先去除多余空白，减少压缩前体积
   303→   303→        str = str.replaceAll(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n').trim()
   304→   304→        const stream = new (window as any).CompressionStream('gzip')
   305→   305→        const writer = stream.writable.getWriter()
   306→   306→        writer.write(new TextEncoder().encode(str))
   307→   307→        writer.close()
   308→   308→        const chunks: Uint8Array[] = []
   309→   309→        const reader = stream.readable.getReader()
   310→   310→        while (true) {
   311→   311→            const { done, value } = await reader.read()
   312→   312→            if (done) {break}
   313→   313→            chunks.push(value)
   314→   314→        }
   315→   315→        const merged = new Uint8Array(chunks.reduce((n, c) => n + c.length, 0))
   316→   316→        let offset = 0
   317→   317→        for (const c of chunks) { merged.set(c, offset); offset += c.length }
   318→   318→        let binary = ''
   319→   319→        for (let i = 0; i < merged.length; i++) {binary += String.fromCharCode(merged[i])}
   320→   320→        return 'gz:' + btoa(binary)
   321→   321→    }
   322→   322→
   323→   323→    // 弹窗
   324→   324→    syncModalVisible = false
   325→   325→
   326→   326→    @Watch('panelVisible')
   327→   327→    async onPanelOpen(val: boolean) {
   328→   328→        if (val) {
   329→   329→            await this.loadRoles()
   330→   330→            await this.loadPrompts()
   331→   331→            // 数据加载完后再滚一次，确保 v-if 面板 DOM 已渲染
   332→   332→            this.$nextTick(() => this.scrollToBottom())
   333→   333→        }
   334→   334→    }
   335→   335→
   336→   336→    @Watch('currentRole')
   337→   337→    async onRoleChange(role: AiRole | null) {
